creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Building net/gssdp fails because of a missing file (gssdp-1.0.deps) in the 
source tarball. (Upstream bug reference:
https://bugzilla.gnome.org/show_bug.cgi?id=682228 ), a fix has been released
as version 0.12.2.1

Fix: Simple upgrade (also at http://burggraben.net/hacks/gssdp.diff.gz ):
How-To-Repeat: build net/gssdp with default options (after applying ports/170895
(vala upgrade))
